calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-10-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Petitioner: Miranda H. Aguilar, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Delisa Alejandra Oropeza-Aguilar.
Objections to the proposed change of name of a Minor were made at the hearing by the Minor's Father: Alejandro Cano Oropeza.
Parties were sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the opposition, it appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Delisa Alejandra Aguilar.
Decree signed in open court.
